case_title: SCHOOLSFIRST FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. LEA C WINTERS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHOOLSFIRST FEDERAL CREDIT UNION

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHOOLSFIRST FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT WINTERS, LEA C DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-22-2014
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHOOLSFIRST FEDERAL CREDIT UNION SERVED AUG-18-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WINTERS, LEA C
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHOOLSFIRST FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT WINTERS, LEA C
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $425.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WINTERS, LEA C
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHOOLSFIRST FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT WINTERS, LEA C
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHOOLSFIRST FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WINTERS, LEA C $16,277.25 PRINCIPAL, $425.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,702.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
